summary: Iteration 100: Creator Dashboard Interactive Features - All backend APIs (30/30 tests passed) and frontend UI features verified working. Dashboard includes 6 tabs (Overview, Feedback, Comments, Users, Popular, Broadcasts), broadcast notifications, user management, search, data export, feedback status changes, and comment moderation.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Creator Dashboard fully functional. All 6 tabs working. Broadcast modal sends notifications to users. User detail modal shows stats and enable/disable toggle. Export buttons download JSON files.

backend_apis.GET /api/creator/overview: WORKING - Returns 14 stat fields (total_users, active_today, etc.)
backend_apis.GET /api/creator/popular-features: WORKING - Returns features list with page and visits
backend_apis.GET /api/creator/feedback: WORKING - Returns feedback items with status
backend_apis.GET /api/creator/user/{user_id}: WORKING - Returns user detail with activity stats
backend_apis.non_admin_access: WORKING - All endpoints return 403 for non-admin users

overview_tab.details: 6 stat cards, Daily Active Users chart (14 days), New Users chart (30 days), Top Features by Usage list

feedback_tab.details: 1 feedback item with Review/Resolve/Dismiss buttons, Export button, filter by status

users_tab.details: 22 users displayed, search input working, Export button present

popular_tab.details: 20 features tracked with usage rankings and progress bars

broadcasts_tab.details: Broadcast history with New Broadcast button

broadcast_modal.details: Audience selection (All Users/Active 7d/New 7d), Title, Message, Link fields, Send Broadcast button. Successfully sent broadcast to 22 users.

user_detail_modal.details: Shows user info, Mood Logs, Journal Entries, AI Sessions, Activity (7d), Disable/Enable Account button
